title: castilleja pallida subsp. typica
intro: Castilleja pallida subsp. typica, also known as pale Indian paintbrush, is a flowering plant species belonging to the bumblebee-bat-pollinated plant family Orobanchaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Castilleja pallida subsp. typica include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and act as a natural decongestant. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
